name: hsb-teamwork
description: HSB Teamwork — a demand-to-delivery toolkit. Each step is a skill invoked as /hsb-teamwork:<skill>. Available: intake-brainstorm (raw demand -> a fully-filled, confidence-graded document via a multi-agent pipeline, plus humanized/translated/enriched variants). Planned: readiness-package, tech-assessment, prd-generation. Template-driven and portable; includes a Codex adapter.
